name: Micky Flanagan
blurb: He became a professional comedian in 1997 and broke through nationally in the early 2010s with his sell-out Out Out tour, whose Out Out routine became a catchphrase.
bio: Micky Flanagan is an English comedian from Bethnal Green in East London whose observational comedy draws on his cockney working-class background. He became a professional comedian in 1997 and broke through nationally in the early 2010s with his sell-out Out Out tour, whose Out Out routine became a catchphrase. He is a regular on UK panel shows and Live at the Apollo.

timeline.ev: Becomes a professional comedian after a comedy course
Presents the Radio 4 series What Chance Change and appears on Live at the Apollo
The Out Out Tour becomes a breakthrough hit
Stages the Back in the Game tour

accolades: Out Out tour DVD became a major commercial success
Out Out coined a widely used catchphrase
Regular performer on Live at the Apollo and the Royal Variety Performance
